description: Lock the areas of your team's brain that only certain people should be editing. Brand strategy, pricing, client positioning, anything sensitive. A short conversation captures what to protect and who owns each area, then Runneth blocks unauthorized edits and routes change requests through your approval channel. Every save in your brain gets stamped with who wrote it. New teammates onboard automatically.

post-install.name: Run the setup conversation
post-install.description: Invokes the skill, which walks the admin through the install conversation, deploys the result, and surfaces a plain-language setup-complete message at the end.
